name: Woomera Mining Limited
summary: Woomera Mining Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an exploration company in Australia. The company primarily explores for copper, lithium, gold, uranium, iron ore, nickel, and cobalt deposits. Its principal project is the Mt Venn gold project, which consists of 2 tenements covering over 50 km of prospective. Woomera Mining Limited was founded in 2011 and is based in Adelaide, Australia.
